field.name: FIVT10CR
field.description: Charge basis amount 5 Cr to 10 Cr

field.name: INCUPTO5
field.description: Increase Charge basis amount upto 5 Cr

field.name: INC5TO10
field.description: Increase Charge basis amount 5 Cr to 10 Cr

field.name: INABOV10
field.description: Increase Charge basis amount above 10 Cr

field.name: LRSCRAMT
field.description: Value of current Txn in INR

field.name: LRSINAMT
field.description: TCS paid on Already Completed amount

field.name: ODIDOCS
field.description: Non submission of documentary evidence by the Indian party under suspicious circumstances

field.name: STATPURP
field.description: Payments have no stated purpose, do not have reference to goods or services or identify only a contact or invoice no

field.name: OUINVCE
field.description: Over/under invoicing of goods or services

field.name: SUBTDIS
field.description: Substantial inconsistencies between the info originally supplied and that contained the docs

field.name: DESCGOOD
field.description: Description of goods or service provided is vague

field.name: DIFSHPMT
field.description: Diff b/w Payment date and Shipment Date

field.name: OLDUP5CR
field.description: Old Charge basis Amount Up to 5 Crore

field.name: OLD5TO10
field.description: Old Charge basis Amount 5 to 10 Crore

field.name: OLDABV10
field.description: Old Charge basis Amount above 10 Crore

field.name: DIFSHPMA
field.description: Diff b/w shipment date and maturity date

field.name: CRCURAMT
field.description: Cross Currency Equivalent Amount in USD

field.name: RBIPOS
field.description: RBI Purpose code for short Realization

browser.label-text: RBI Purpose code for short Realization

field.name: DFDUEDAT
field.description: Difference between due date and payment date
